message:
feat(calibrate): add empirical Bayes conjugate updates with versioning

Implements conjugate hyperparameter updates for Beta, Gamma, and Dirichlet
priors from shadow-mode observations. Includes bounded learning rate,
safety clamping, prior version history with rollback support.

Closes process_triage-72j.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
